highlights.description: Go accessibility auditing toolkit for WCAG 2.0, 2.1, and 2.2 compliance testing
axe-core integration with LLM-as-a-Judge evaluation to reduce false positives
Multiple audit modes: single page, site crawling, and user journey testing
Report formats: JSON, HTML, Markdown, VPAT 2.4, WCAG-EM, CSV

added.description: WCAG rules and success criteria mapping for WCAG 2.0, 2.1, and 2.2 at levels A, AA, AAA
axe-core integration for industry-standard accessibility rules
LLM-as-a-Judge evaluation with support for Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, xAI, and Ollama
Website crawler with SPA detection, depth limiting, and robots.txt respect
Journey-based testing with YAML step definitions for authenticated flows
Specialized browser-based tests: keyboard, focus, reflow, target size, text spacing, hover, flash
Report generation: JSON, HTML, Markdown, VPAT 2.4, WCAG-EM, CSV formats
Remediation task generation with priority assignment and fix suggestions
MCP server for AI assistant integration (Claude, etc.)
HTTP API server with `/audit` and `/health` endpoints
CLI tool with `audit`, `serve`, `mcp serve`, `compare`, and `demo` commands
Configuration via YAML file, environment variables, and CLI flags
Authentication helpers for auditing protected pages
Multi-agent-spec integration for use in multi-agent workflows

documentation.description: README with quick start, features, and usage examples
MkDocs documentation site with Material theme
Getting Started guides: installation and quickstart
User Guide: audit types, configuration, LLM integration, report formats
Reference: CLI, HTTP API, Go library, MCP server
Example code for basic and multi-agent usage

dependencies.description: omnillm v0.13.0 for multi-provider LLM support
multi-agent-spec v0.8.0 for multi-agent workflow integration
MCP SDK v1.4.0 for Model Context Protocol server
